preservedBehaviors.description: expo-web-success uses auth() + createMobileJwtFromSessionUser instead of getToken for session-based JWT generation
expo-web-success has a reusable htmlResponse helper with Cache-Control no-store headers
expo-web-success exports both GET and POST handlers (POST delegates to GET)
expo-web-success includes try/catch error handling returning 500 on failure
token/route.js uses auth() + createMobileJwtFromSessionUser with Cache-Control no-store headers
token/route.js exports POST handler delegating to GET for client parity
Message payload includes type AUTH_SUCCESS with jwt and user, serialized via JSON.stringify in postMessage
Both routes postMessage AUTH_ERROR on unauthorized and AUTH_SUCCESS with jwt/user on success
